---
title: "Investigating Factors That Influence High IMDB Film Ratings"
number-sections: true
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-tools: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(gridExtra)
library(moderndive)
dataset09 <- read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Janet180112/DAS-Group-09/main/dataset09.csv")
```

```{r}
#| include: false # Hides this block from output
#| label: load-happy-data

```

# Introduction {#sec-Intro}

# Exploratory Data Analysis {#sec-EDA}

# Formal Data Analysis {#sec-FDA}

# Conclusions {#sec-Conc}
